properties.name: Điện Biên Phủ
properties.description: Named after the famous battle of Điện Biên Phủ in 1954 which marked a significant turning point in the First Indochina War.
properties.label: Điện Biên Phủ

properties.name: Phan Đình Phùng
properties.description: Phan Đình Phùng was a Vietnamese official and leader of the anti-French resistance in the late 19th century.
properties.label: Phan Đình Phùng

properties.name: Hoàng Diệu
properties.description: Hoàng Diệu was a Vietnamese mandarin and military officer known for his defense of Hanoi against French forces.
properties.label: Hoàng Diệu

properties.name: Nguyễn Huệ
properties.description: Named after the revered General Nguyễn Huệ, who played a pivotal role in Vietnam's history during the Tây Sơn Rebellion, this street embodies the spirit of resilience and national pride.
properties.label: Nguyễn Huệ

properties.name: Cách Mạng Tháng Tám

properties.name: Trần Hưng Đạo
properties.description: This street honors Trần Hưng Đạo, a legendary military leader known for his strategic brilliance during the Mongol invasions of the 13th century, symbolizing Vietnamese courage and determination.
properties.label: Trần Hưng Đạo

properties.name: Lê Lợi
properties.description: Lê Lợi, the founder of the Lê dynasty, is celebrated in this street name, representing the struggle for independence against Chinese domination in the 15th century.
properties.label: Lê Lợi

properties.name: Pasteur
properties.description: This street is named after Louis Pasteur, the renowned French biologist who developed the pasteurization process and vaccines.
